title: Weltgewebe node mutation PR hardening and supersession
goal: Finish the safe node edit/delete implementation on current main, preserve crash and reference integrity, obtain exact-head review evidence, and retire the conflicting predecessor without merging its direct edge mutation model.
completion: PR #1440 or a traceable replacement contains the reviewed crash-safe and fail-closed node mutation implementation on current main.
The exact final head passes required CI and has a downloadable SHA-256-bound final diff before any merge.
PR #1424 is closed as superseded only after any non-conflicting unique requirements have been reconciled explicitly.

metadata.source: live open-PR, CI, Git ancestry and dirty-worktree audit on 2026-07-15
metadata.safety_boundary: Do not overwrite or clean the existing dirty node-edit-delete worktree. Do not merge until the exact current GitHub diff has external review opportunity, required checks are green and review evidence is valid.
metadata.primary_completion: Node mutation hardening and predecessor supersession are complete; measurement, action-bar and accountability follow-ups remain independently ready.
